name: Cristian & Gabriella
shortBio: Signature sensual bachata couple with musicality-first classes.
fullBio: Cristian & Gabriella teach partner connection, frame quality, and social-floor adaptation for intermediate and advanced dancers.

name: Klau & Los
shortBio: Performance-focused duo known for clean transitions.
fullBio: Klau & Los blend show choreography and social dance practicals in their workshop curriculum.

name: DJ Alejandro
shortBio: Late-night latin & bachata social floor curator.
fullBio: DJ Alejandro builds progressive party sets optimized for social dancers and showcases.

name: DK Media
fullBio: Captures social floor, performances, and venue stories across all event days.
